description_long: This is a single-story modern bungalow with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular layout. The front features a driveway leading to a garage, a small green lawn, and a wooden front door flanked by windows. The exterior walls are finished in light-colored brick or concrete, with wooden fencing enclosing the backyard and side areas. The backyard includes a grassy area with a tree and some landscaping, while the side yards are bordered by planters and privacy fencing. Large windows and sliding glass doors provide ample natural light and connect the interior to the outdoor spaces. The overall design emphasizes open, functional living with a blend of hardscape and softscape elements.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, light brick exterior, garage, and landscaped front and back yards enclosed by wooden fencing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, main entrance, front lawn, and partial view of the backyard tree.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, flat facade, privacy fencing, and glimpses of interior rooms and backyard landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a grassy area, tree, and wooden fencing, as well as the back entrances and windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side yard, wooden fencing, and additional access points to the backyard and interior.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
